result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedTable) relation "core_crm.account" does not exist
LINE 3: JOIN core_crm.Account a ON a.Id = c.accountid
             ^

[SQL: SELECT a."ShippingState" AS state, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) / 86400.0) AS avg_days_to_close
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON a.Id = c.accountid
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
GROUP BY a."ShippingState"
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY avg_days_to_close ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT a."ShippingState" AS state, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) / 86400.0) AS avg_days_to_close
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON a.Id = c.accountid
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
GROUP BY a."ShippingState"
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY avg_days_to_close ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT a."ShippingState" AS state, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) / 86400.0) AS avg_days_to_close
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON a.Id = c.accountid
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
GROUP BY a."ShippingState"
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY avg_days_to_close ASC
LIMIT 1;
